mapper.sql: select p.policy_id, p.park_id, p.service_title, p.project_scope, p.service_status, p.view_count, p.permanent_flag, p.valid_time, p.online_flag, p.cover_url, p.content, p.attachment_files, p.sort_order, p.remark, p.del_flag, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, park.name as park_name from biz_policy_service p left join ics_park park on p.park_id = park.id
mapper.select: order by p.sort_order asc, p.create_time desc, p.policy_id desc
order by p.sort_order asc, p.create_time desc, p.policy_id desc

select count(1) as totalCount, coalesce(sum(case when p.service_status = '0' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as publishedCount, coalesce(sum(case when p.service_status = '1' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as draftCount, coalesce(sum(case when p.online_flag = '0' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as onlineCount, coalesce(sum(p.view_count), 0) as viewCount from biz_policy_service p
mapper.update: update biz_policy_service set online_flag = #{onlineFlag}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where policy_id = #{policyId}
